question: The chart shows regional sales share. Which statement is correct according to the percentages shown?

options.A: South has the second-largest market share.
options.B: North has the largest market share among the regions shown.
options.C: East has a larger market share than South.
options.D: Central has the smallest market share.

explanation: From the labels, North has the highest share (49%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking North is largest when relying on visual comparison.
